## Summary

Describe the feature.

## Use case

Explain who benefits and why.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired contract, tooling, or documentation behavior.

## Privacy impact

Explain whether the change affects on-chain data, off-chain records, or credential verification assumptions.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Tests are included or updated.
- [ ] Documentation is included or updated.
- [ ] No sensitive academic records are stored on-chain.
